allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -eq "node" } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime | Format-Table)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output \($r.Content | Select-String "title"\) } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\프로젝트\\재관국"; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd" -ArgumentList "/c npx vite 2>&1" -PassThru | Select-Object Id; Start-Sleep 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "Server OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Server not ready: $_" })
PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\프로젝트\\재관국"; $env:NODE_OPTIONS="--stack-size=65536"; npx tsc; node --stack-size=65536 "node_modules\\vite\\bin\\vite.js" build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\프로젝트\\재관국"; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList \(npx --no-install resolve serve\), "dist/", "--port", "4173" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden 2>&1 | Out-Null; Start-Sleep 3; Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:4173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 | Select-Object StatusCode)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Pictures" -Recurse | Select-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\나현아\\Pictures" -Recurse | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell(ls "c:\\프로젝트\\재관국\\public" 2>$null; if \(-not \(Test-Path "c:\\프로젝트\\재관국\\public"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory "c:\\프로젝트\\재관국\\public" }; Copy-Item "c:\\프로젝트\\재관국\\pictures\\로고.png" "c:\\프로젝트\\재관국\\public\\logo.png" -Force; Write-Host "Done")
Bash(timeout 30 bash -c 'until curl -sf http://localhost >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done')

PowerShell($proc = Get-Process -Id 26328 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $proc.CommandLine; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -OwningProcess 26328 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) | Select-Object LocalPort, State | Where-Object State -eq "Listen")

PowerShell($procs = @\(26328, 30716, 33768\); foreach \($pid in $procs\) { $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -OwningProcess $pid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object State -eq "Listen"; if \($conns\) { Write-Output "PID $pid listens on: $\($conns.LocalPort -join ', '\)" } })
PowerShell(Get-Process node | ForEach-Object { $id = $_.Id; netstat -ano | Where-Object { $_ -match "LISTENING" -and $_ -match "\\s$id$" } } | Select-Object -First 10)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\프로젝트\\재관국"; $exclude = @\("node_modules", "dist", ".git", "scripts"\); $src = "c:\\프로젝트\\재관국"; $dest = "c:\\tmp\\재관국_배포.zip"; if \(Test-Path $dest\) { Remove-Item $dest }; $files = Get-ChildItem $src -Recurse | Where-Object { $path = $_.FullName.Replace\($src + "\\", ""\); $top = $path.Split\("\\"\)[0]; $exclude -notcontains $top }; Compress-Archive -Path \($files | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName\) -DestinationPath $dest -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "완료: $dest"; \(Get-Item $dest\).Length / 1MB)

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/documents.json'\); const withFlags = d.filter\(x => x.requiredFlags && x.requiredFlags.length > 0\); console.log\(withFlags.map\(x => x.id + ' | ' + x.title\).join\('\\n'\)\);")

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "c:\\프로젝트\\재관국\\src\\components\\EventScreen.tsx" -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $content -match '\\r\\n' | Out-Null; "Has CRLF: $\($content -match '\\r\\n'\)"; $content -match '\\n' | Out-Null; "Has LF: $\($content -match '\\n'\)")

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "c:\\프로젝트\\재관국\\src\\components\\EventScreen.tsx" -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $idx = $content.IndexOf\("censored.has\(i\) ?"\); "Found at index: $idx"; $snippet = $content.Substring\($idx, 40\); $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($snippet\); \($bytes | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\("X2"\) }\) -join " ")
